customCommands.name: audit
customCommands.prompt: Audit the selected code or entire file for: security issues, pydantic deprecation, type safety, constitutional violations (agents claiming authority they don't have), and performance anti-patterns. Return findings as a structured JSON array with severity, file, line, and remediation.

customCommands.name: test
customCommands.prompt: Generate comprehensive tests for the selected code. Use pytest for Python, node:test for TypeScript. Include: happy path, edge cases, error handling, forbidden behavior, and escalation cases. Return only the test code.

customCommands.name: refactor
customCommands.prompt: Refactor the selected code for clarity, performance, and constitutional compliance. Preserve all behavior. Return the refactored code with a brief rationale. Do not modify files marked as constitutional (floors.py, judgment.py, vault999).

customCommands.name: docs
customCommands.prompt: Update the docstring/comments for the selected code to match the current implementation. Detect doc-reality drift. Return only the updated documentation.
